## 3. Safeguards

Subcontractor Business Associate must:

- Implement administrative, physical, and technical safeguards per 45 CFR 164.504(e)(2)(ii)(B) and 164.308–164.312
- Report any security incident or breach within [N] hours of discovery (HIPAA 60-day max; founder position: 24-hour notification)
- Maintain documented HIPAA Security Rule compliance program

## 4. Subprocessor (Subcontractor) Management

Subcontractor must obtain BAAs from any further subprocessors handling PHI per 45 CFR 164.308(b)(2).
